summary: Iteration 5 — verified bilingual i18n rollout (Landing/Login/Register) and full Discovery UI (Trending Sellers strip, lowest-price badges, Compare drawer with persistence, real ProductDetail + Related Products). 8/8 backend tests PASS for new endpoints + regression. All 11 frontend test points PASS on preview URL.
action_items: No action items. All iter5 acceptance criteria are met on preview build.
Reminder (non-blocking): production www.biz-salama.co.tz still serves stale build until next redeploy.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/products/related/{unknown_id} correctly returns {products:[],count:0} instead of 404/500 — good defensive design that prevents broken PDP related strips.

is_lowest_price tagging in /products/public is correctly conditional on >=2 items per category AND price differentiation (cheapest < max). Verified empirically — 6 categories were tagged, 1-item categories were not.

Related-products sort by absolute price distance is done in Python over a 40-item candidate pool — fine at current scale (a few hundred products) but should move to Mongo aggregation if catalog grows past low thousands.
Trending Sellers aggregation pipeline groups by seller_id of *active* products (is_active!=false). Gracefully handles the case where a seller's user record is missing (defaults to 'Muuzaji').

compareStore.ts persistence works correctly across React Router navigation (verified via localStorage 'biz-salama-compare' inspection on Marketplace → /product/{id} → back). Items array, FAB count, and tagging on cheaper item are all consistent.
i18n LangProvider drives both LandingPage 'How It Works'/'Trust'/'CTA' AND Footer/Login/Register/Marketplace/PDP — biz_lang localStorage key is the single source of truth and persists across reloads.
server.py is now ~3816+ lines — still long but no new bugs introduced; recommend splitting into routers in a future refactor.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (i18n landing/login/register + trending strip + lowest-price + compare flow + real PDP + related + persistence)

test_credentials: Primary login user: +255712345678 / test1234 — verified via /api/auth/login regression test.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Existing marketplace catalog (37 products, 2+ trending sellers) is sufficient for all Discovery assertions.
context_for_next_testing_agent: test_iter5_discovery.py covers: trending sellers shape+count, related-products (real id + unknown id), lowest-price tagging logic per category, login regression, voice/3-party smoke (no 5xx). Frontend Playwright run verified: lang-toggle-sw/en persist via biz_lang in localStorage; data-testid trending-sellers-strip, trending-seller-{id}, lowest-price-badge-{id}, compare-toggle-{id}, compare-fab, compare-drawer, compare-clear-btn, related-products, related-card-{id} all wired correctly. Compare zustand store key is 'biz-salama-compare' and survives React Router navigation. Real ProductDetail uses /api/products/detail/{id} — confirmed not the old 'Kitenge Fabric' sample.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no bugs found this iteration. Two pre-existing concerns from prior iterations remain documented but unrelated to iter5 scope: (a) production domain stale-build needs redeploy (out of scope), (b) server.py size growth (refactor backlog).
